div.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

li.a: codesystem TIFLOW EREZEPT Operation Outcome Details CS v1.0.0-draft (CodeSystem)
codesystem TI Operation Outcome Details CodeSystem v1.1.1 (CodeSystem)
codesystem TIFLOW Operation Outcome Details CS v1.0.0-draft (CodeSystem)

tr.td: PZN ungültig
The provided PZN is invalid or not permitted in the current processing context
Arzneimittelkategorie nicht zulässig
The prescription contains a forbidden medication category, for example BTM
MVO-Flowtyp ungültig
A multiple prescription is not allowed for the addressed flow type
Mehrfachverordnung ungültig
The multiple prescription metadata is inconsistent or violates MVO constraints
MVO-Startdatum ungültig
The start date of the multiple prescription redemption period is missing or invalid
MVO-Enddatum ungültig
The end date of the multiple prescription redemption period is invalid
MVO-ID ungültig
The multiple prescription id does not match the required identifier schema
Teilverordnung noch nicht einlösbar
The multiple prescription part is not redeemable yet because its redemption period has not started
Zugriffsrolle nicht zulässig
The authenticated actor role is not permitted to execute this operation
Task-Secret stimmt nicht überein
The provided task secret does not match the secret stored for the task

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://gematik.de/fhir/tiflow/core/CodeSystem/tiflow-operation-outcome-details-cs"><version value="1.0.0-draft"><code value="TIFLOW_SECRET_MISMATCH"><display value="Task-Secret stimmt nicht überein"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: Task-Status passt nicht
The task is in a status that does not allow execution of this operation
MedicationDispense ungültig
The provided MedicationDispense resource is invalid for this operation
MedicationDispense fehlt
A required MedicationDispense resource is missing for this operation
Keine OCSP-Antwort zur Signatur
Certificate revocation status could not be determined because no OCSP response was available
Authentifizierter Akteur ist nicht Eigentümer
The authenticated actor is not the owner of the addressed task

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://gematik.de/fhir/tiflow/core/CodeSystem/tiflow-operation-outcome-details-cs"><version value="1.0.0-draft"><code value="TIFLOW_AUTH_NOT_OWNER"><display value="Authentifizierter Akteur ist nicht Eigentümer"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: AccessCode stimmt nicht überein
The provided access code does not match the access code assigned to the task
Task-ID erforderlich
The operation requires a task id in the request
KVNR stimmt nicht überein
The KVNR in the request does not match the KVNR assigned to the task context

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://gematik.de/fhir/tiflow/core/CodeSystem/tiflow-operation-outcome-details-cs"><version value="1.0.0-draft"><code value="TIFLOW_KVNR_MISMATCH"><display value="KVNR stimmt nicht überein"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: Signaturrolle ungültig
The signature was created by an actor role that is not allowed for the signed artifact
Flowtyp passt nicht
The task flow type does not match the expected flow for this operation
Coverage-Typ passt nicht
The coverage type does not match the expected coverage context
Zertifikat ungültig
The certificate used for authentication or signature validation is invalid
OCSP Abfrage fehlgeschlagen
Failed to retrieve the OCSP response for the certificate of the signature
Signatur ungültig
The digital signature is invalid or cannot be verified
KVNR ungültig
The provided KVNR is invalid or does not conform to the expected format
Signaturzeitpunkt passt nicht
The authoredOn timestamp does not match the signed content
IKNR ungültig
The provided IKNR is invalid or not accepted in this context
LANR oder ZANR ungültig
The provided LANR or ZANR is invalid or not accepted for this operation

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://gematik.de/fhir/tiflow/core/CodeSystem/tiflow-operation-outcome-details-cs"><version value="1.0.0-draft"><code value="TIFLOW_LANR_ZANR_INVALID"><display value="LANR oder ZANR ungültig"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: Task wurde gelöscht
The task was already cancelled or deleted and can no longer be processed
Task ist abgelaufen
The task cannot be processed because its redemption period has expired
Nachricht an sich selbst nicht zulässig
A communication message addressed to the sender itself is not permitted

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://gematik.de/fhir/tiflow/core/CodeSystem/tiflow-operation-outcome-details-cs"><version value="1.0.0-draft"><code value="TIFLOW_MESSAGE_TO_SELF"><display value="Nachricht an sich selbst nicht zulässig"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: Kommunikationsinhalt ungültig
The communication payload is syntactically or semantically invalid
Versicherter nicht berechtigt
The insurant does not meet the eligibility constraints for this communication flow
Empfänger ungültig
The specified recipient is invalid for the requested communication
Task nicht gefunden
The referenced task does not exist
MVO noch nicht gültig
The multi-prescription is not yet valid at the current point in time

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://gematik.de/fhir/tiflow/core/CodeSystem/tiflow-operation-outcome-details-cs"><version value="1.0.0-draft"><code value="TIFLOW_MVO_NOT_VALID_YET"><display value="MVO noch nicht gültig"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

title.value: TIFLOW EREZEPT Operation Outcome Details VS

display.value: Nachricht an sich selbst nicht zulässig
